title: Component is Stateless
text: Component is Stateless Defines whether the component is stateless. Description When a component that has state is executed on a server, the server remembers instances that are associated with the component. When an operation on a component instance is subsequently activated (by the activate ProcScript statement), it can use information retrieved earlier in the same component instance. When a stateless component is executed on a server, a subsequent request is processed as if the component had just been initialized. Note: This property is not applicable for stored procedures, and for Java, C, and Uniface components that are executed locally or over Uniface middleware.
